mapper.select: SELECT id, event_id, event_type, biz_key, exchange_name, routing_key, payload, status, retry_count, max_retry_count, next_retry_time, fail_reason, expire_time, sent_time, created_time, updated_time FROM tb_outbox_event WHERE event_type = 'ORDER_TIMEOUT' AND status IN ('INIT', 'FAILED') AND retry_count < max_retry_count AND (next_retry_time IS NULL OR next_retry_time <= #{now}) ORDER BY updated_time ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_outbox_event SET status = 'SENT', sent_time = NOW(), next_retry_time = NULL, fail_reason = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'SENDING' AND retry_count = #{expectedRetryCount}

UPDATE tb_outbox_event SET retry_count = retry_count + 1, status = CASE WHEN retry_count + 1 >= max_retry_count THEN 'NEED_MANUAL' ELSE 'FAILED' END, next_retry_time = CASE WHEN retry_count + 1 >= max_retry_count THEN NULL ELSE #{nextRetryTime} END, fail_reason = #{failReason} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'SENDING' AND retry_count = #{expectedRetryCount}

UPDATE tb_outbox_event SET retry_count = retry_count + 1, status = CASE WHEN retry_count + 1 >= max_retry_count THEN 'NEED_MANUAL' ELSE 'FAILED' END, next_retry_time = CASE WHEN retry_count + 1 >= max_retry_count THEN NULL ELSE #{nextRetryTime} END, fail_reason = 'OUTBOX_SENDING_TIMEOUT' WHERE status = 'SENDING' AND event_type = 'ORDER_TIMEOUT' AND updated_time <= #{staleBefore} ORDER BY updated_time ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.select: SELECT id, event_id, event_type, biz_key, exchange_name, routing_key, payload, status, retry_count, max_retry_count, next_retry_time, fail_reason, expire_time, sent_time, created_time, updated_time FROM tb_outbox_event WHERE status = 'NEED_MANUAL' AND event_type = 'ORDER_TIMEOUT' ORDER BY updated_time ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, event_id, event_type, biz_key, exchange_name, routing_key, payload, status, retry_count, max_retry_count, next_retry_time, fail_reason, expire_time, sent_time, created_time, updated_time FROM tb_outbox_event WHERE event_type = 'REDIS_STOCK_RECOVERY' AND status IN ('INIT', 'FAILED') AND retry_count < max_retry_count AND (next_retry_time IS NULL OR next_retry_time <= #{now}) ORDER BY updated_time ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_outbox_event SET retry_count = retry_count + 1, status = CASE WHEN retry_count + 1 >= max_retry_count THEN 'NEED_MANUAL' ELSE 'FAILED' END, next_retry_time = CASE WHEN retry_count + 1 >= max_retry_count THEN NULL ELSE #{nextRetryTime} END, fail_reason = 'REDIS_STOCK_RECOVERY_SENDING_TIMEOUT' WHERE status = 'SENDING' AND event_type = 'REDIS_STOCK_RECOVERY' AND updated_time <= #{staleBefore} ORDER BY updated_time ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.select: SELECT id, event_id, event_type, biz_key, exchange_name, routing_key, payload, status, retry_count, max_retry_count, next_retry_time, fail_reason, expire_time, sent_time, created_time, updated_time FROM tb_outbox_event WHERE status = 'NEED_MANUAL' AND event_type = 'REDIS_STOCK_RECOVERY' ORDER BY updated_time ASC LIMIT #{limit}
